title: Fleet & Route Performance Analytics
description: Monitor fleet utilisation, on-time delivery rates, fuel efficiency, and route profitability across your logistics network.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

layers: Bronze (Raw Vehicles, Routes, Deliveries, Fuel Logs)

sampleData.description: 100 fleet vehicles with type, capacity, depot, and status
500 route definitions with origin, destination, distance, and SLA
50,000 delivery records with planned/actual times, status, and distance
20,000 fuel fill events with litres, cost, and odometer readings

fabricItems.name: transportation_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all fleet and logistics analytics

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Clean data, derive delay flags, fuel efficiency, and utilisation bands

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: 6 Gold tables: fleet summary, delivery performance, route analysis, driver scorecard, weekly trends, depot scorecards

fabricItems.name: 04_reporting_views
fabricItems.description: SQL views: executive summary, late deliveries, fuel analysis, route efficiency

fabricItems.name: 05_dashboard
fabricItems.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with KPI cards, late delivery table, and fuel efficiency summary

fabricItems.name: transportation_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake model with fleet, delivery, and route performance measures

fabricItems.name: Fleet & Delivery Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page dashboard: Fleet Overview, Delivery Performance, Route & Fuel

fabricItems.name: daily_transport_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates all notebooks sequentially with retry
